arts.ttl: Bayern Munich Sporting Director confirms they are out of race for Barcelona target
arts.sum: Barcelona and Bayern Munich have been the two clubs most closely linked with Bayer Leverkusen central defender Jonathan Tah, who is out of contract at the end of the season. Able to sign a precontract, Tah is looking for a move in the summer, but Bayern are unlikely to be his destination. arts.ttl: Neymar and his dad discuss Brazilian’s future amid Barca return rumors
arts.sum: Neymar was also asked about his future and explained why he hasn’t signed a long contract with the club. I didn’t sign a long contract because I didn’t know how I was going to return, how I was going to feel in those months.

De Jong convinced by the project and by Flick to renew with Barça - Mundo Deportivo Barça coach admits going top again would be great for the team's confidence, but that there's still a long way to go and that working and improving is most important.

arts.ttl: Ter Stegen posts positive update as Barca stopper inches closer to comeback
arts.sum: Barcelona goalkeeper Marc-Andre ter Stegen has posted a positive injury update as he continues on the road to recovery. Ter Stegen has now revealed that he’s back working with the ball on the training pitch in another positive development for the stopper.
